creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: This is a quick band-aid, GENTOO mirror list needs to be cleaned up and we should probably look into using https://github.com/l1ving/youtube-dl (short term) or replace it with youtube-dlc ( https://www.reddit.com/r/DataHoarder/comments/ir8ic6/youtubedlc_an_active_fork_of_youtubedl/g9v55og/?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=web2x&context=3 )
